item.title: 18 March 2026Joint Statement on the Establishment of a Strategic Partnership Between Japan and the Republic of SingaporePeoplePM Lawrence WongTopicsForeign affairsPrime Minister Lawrence Wong and Prime Minister Takaichi Sanae announced the upgrade of Singapore-Japan relations to a Strategic Partnership on 18 March 2026.Press Release - PMO

18 March 2026DPM Gan Kim Yong at the Maersk's World Gateway II Opening CeremonyPeopleDPM Gan Kim YongTopicsEconomyInfrastructureScience and technologyTradeSpeech by Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Trade and Industry Gan Kim Yong at the Maersk's World Gateway II Opening Ceremony on 18 March 2026.Speech - PMO

17 March 2026PM Lawrence Wong's Nikkei Op-Ed for “Singapore and Japan at 60 – Kanreki”PeoplePM Lawrence WongTopicsForeign affairsEnglish translation of Nikkei Op-Ed by Prime Minister and Minister for Finance Lawrence Wong ahead of his Official Visit to Japan on 17 March 2026.Op-Ed - PMO

16 March 2026PM Lawrence Wong to Visit Japan (Mar 2026)PeoplePrime Minister's OfficeTopicsForeign affairsPrime Minister and Minister for Finance Lawrence Wong will make an Official Visit to Tokyo, Japan from 17 to 19 March 2026.Press Release - PMO

9 March 2026Appointments of Judges of the High Court (Mar 2026)PeoplePrime Minister's OfficeTopicsLawWith these appointments, the Supreme Court will have a total of 35 Judges (including the Chief Justice, five Justices of the Court of Appeal, four Judges of the Appellate Division, 19 Judges of the High Court, one Judicial Commissioner, and five Senior Judges) and 26 International Judges.Press Release - PMO

7 March 2026DPM Gan Kim Yong at the Community Chest SG60 Appreciation CeremonyPeopleDPM Gan Kim YongTopicsGovernanceSocial safety netsSpeech by Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Trade and Industry Gan Kim Yong at the Community Chest SG60 Appreciation Ceremony on 7 March 2026.Speech - PMO

6 March 2026Acknowledgement to the Chair, Budget 2026 — Speech by Leader of the House, Minister Indranee RajahPeoplePMO MinistersTopicsEconomyFamilies and communitiesFinanceJobs and productivityParliamentPopulationScience and technologySocial safety netsTranscript of speech by Leader of the House, Minister Indranee Rajah, at the conclusion of the Committee of Supply debates for Budget 2026 on 6 March 2026.Speech - PMO

2 March 2026PM Lawrence Wong at the Joint Press Conference with President of the Republic of Korea Lee Jae Myung (Mar 2026)PeoplePM Lawrence WongTopicsEconomyForeign affairsTradeRemarks by Prime Minister and Minister for Finance Lawrence Wong at the joint press conference with President of the Republic of Korea Lee Jae Myung on 2 March 2026.Speech - PMO
